news.headline: Here’s what happened in crypto today
CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) drops 3.5% as nearly all assets decline
Cardano can now be used to pay at 137 Spar stores across Switzerland
Core Scientific secures up to $1 billion loan facility from Morgan Stanley
How US investigators traced $61M in crypto tied to romance scams across wallets
Bitcoin’s drawdown hasn’t shaken institutional investors yet, says CoinShares
Revolut makes second attempt at US bank charter, appoints new US CEO
Crypto-friendly fintech giant Revolut files for U.S. banking license
